Browse chord shapes

Move from short three-chord ideas to longer loops. Each dot is a chord phrase; nearby dots tend to behave similarly in songs. Hover a dot to read the chords and see how often they appear.

Dots are chord phrasesEach dot is a short musical phrase, like a word or token in a language model.
